rows.label: qev042203_MSG0002
rows.name: [ST:playername ]-chan, you are seriously way too strong, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0003
rows.name: Napopon loves strong people, but it is frustrating to lose, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_SEL0011
rows.name: Comfort her by saying it was a fun fight.

rows.label: qev042203_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that it was not fun at all.

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hyaa!
I think I am falling for [ST:playername ]-chan, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0005
rows.name:
...But, this is a forbidden love, mo...
I will keep it tucked away as a memory in Napopon's heart, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0006
rows.name: Haaahn! Napopon caused [ST:playername ]-chan to suffer, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0007
rows.name: Napopon completely did not intend for that, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0008
rows.name: I just wanted [ST:playername ]-chan to have a good time, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0010
rows.name: I have bestowed my blessing upon the Nopon gemstone [ST:playername ]-chan brought, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0011
rows.name: With this, you should be one step closer to the origin of the Nopon, mo~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042203_MSG0013
rows.name: Ah, please tell that late-bloomer Nopopon-chan to hurry up and get a girlfriend, mo~[ST:wait ]
